title: Delegatecall and bubble up returndata for both success and revert paths
description: Proxy contracts must transparently forward returndata in both success and failure cases. After delegatecall, returndatacopy(0x00, 0x00, returndatasize()) copies the entire returndata to memory; then return(0x00, returndatasize()) on success or revert(0x00, returndatasize()) on failure preserves the exact bytes the implementation produced. Standard EIP-1967 / EIP-7702 / ERC6551 proxy fallback pattern.
when_to_apply: Any proxy fallback function — EIP-1967, EIP-7702, ERC6551, ERC4337 minimal proxies, transparent proxies
when_not_to_apply: When the caller needs special handling of revert reasons distinct from the implementation
